description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a single-seat cockpit positioned near the front. The aircraft features sharply swept-back wings mounted mid-fuselage, with prominent control surfaces and a pair of underwing pylons. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The exterior is finished in a matte gray color, typical of tactical aircraft, and the surface appears hard and metallic.
description: A gray, military-style jet airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, a single-seat cockpit, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the jet, including the cockpit, swept-back wings, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wing shape, mid-fuselage mounting, and overall planform of the airplane.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail section, cockpit canopy, and landing gear details.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage, landing gear, and underside of the wings and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted in the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all deployed and appearing retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
